item.title: HYKE: Northern Light(s) now available for Apple Arcade
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

Previously released for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC.

Pixel art action RPG HYKE: Northern Light(s) is now available for Apple Arcade, publishers Akatsuki Games and Aniplex, and developer Blast Edge Games announced.

HYKE: Northern Light(s) first launched for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC via Steam on September 18, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Apple Arcade:

About

Throughout history, witches have long coexisted with humankind in the shadows of the world. However, a great war eventually broke out, and Aurora, the most powerful of them, perished at the end of the conflict.

More than a decade later, in a desolate world scarred by the war, a young witch named Hyke embarks on a journey with her beloved vehicle, searching for her long-lost mother. Along the way, she encounters witches that wield special powers and call themselves “Meteos.”

Hyke soon finds herself entangled in a conflict between the Meteos and a looming threat.

Witches, camping, and an adventure across the world!

Embark on a thrilling 2D top-down action pixel RPG with Hyke, the witch who loves camping, as you explore dangerous forbidden zones filled with magic. When you’re resting from your journey, enjoy the warmth of campfires, listen to soothing music, and relax before setting out on more daring adventures with your companions.

Key Features

  • Pixel Art With Stunning Details – Beautiful, vibrant 2D-pixel graphics that bring the world to life.
  • Charming Witches – Let these cute, powerful and unique witches lead you through an exciting adventure.
  • Diverse Gameplay – Play as seven distinct characters, each offering a unique experience and allowing various strategies to conquer different stages.
  • Relaxing Camp Life – Take breaks at camp to rest, sort through your favorite gear, and personalize your camp site!
  • Cooking Buffs – Prepare meals at camp to gain buffs for the next stage.
  • Global Challenges – Compete in score attack modes across every stage and see how you stack up against players worldwide!

Watch a new trailer below.

Apple Arcade Launch Trailer
